Hero.title: Build staff schedules in a few clicks, not hours.
Hero.subtitle: Shiftly automatically creates staff schedules for healthcare teams — respecting legal requirements, preferences, and real-world constraints.
Hero.supporting: Built for healthcare teams managing complex shift schedules.

Problem.title: Scheduling is still manual, slow, and stressful.
Problem.description: Healthcare teams spend hours every week building staff schedules. Managing availability, vacations, sick calls and legal constraints makes scheduling complex and error-prone.
Problem.bullet1: Hours lost every week on manual planning.
Problem.bullet4: Risk of mistakes and unfair schedules.

Solution.title: Meet Shiftly
Solution.description: Shiftly automatically generates optimal staff schedules in a few clicks — taking into account legal rules, team balance and preferences. No spreadsheets. No guesswork. No wasted time.

Features.title: Built for real-world healthcare scheduling
Features.feature1Description: Create complete staff schedules in a few clicks.
Features.feature2Description: Quickly find the best replacements when someone calls in sick.
Features.feature3Description: Part-time schedules, recurring shifts, custom patterns — all handled seamlessly.
Features.feature4Description: Respect legal requirements and internal policies.
Features.feature5Description: Export as PDF, auto-send by email, or share a live view for your team.
Features.feature6Description: Employees can request specific shifts and swaps directly in the app.
Features.sickCallDescription: When someone calls in sick or requests a shift change, Shiftly immediately shows you who's available to swap — so you can resolve it in a few clicks.

Differentiation.title: Built by people who actually did the job
Differentiation.description: Shiftly was created by people who managed real teams and experienced the frustration of manual scheduling. We built Shiftly to eliminate hours of repetitive work and make scheduling simple, fair and efficient.

BrandStatement.title: We build software for the people who care for others
BrandStatement.description: Shiftly exists to simplify workforce scheduling so healthcare teams can focus on what truly matters: caring for people.

EarlyAccess.title: We are looking for early partners
EarlyAccess.description: We are currently working with a limited number of healthcare teams to test and improve Shiftly. Join as an early partner and help shape the future of staff scheduling.
EarlyAccess.perk1: Direct access to the founding team

ContactForm.title: Request a Demo
ContactForm.description: Tell us a bit about your team and we'll get back to you within one working day.
ContactForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your scheduling challenges (optional)
ContactForm.successMessage: We'll get back to you within one working day.
ContactForm.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us at

Footer.tagline: Smart staff scheduling for healthcare teams.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.introText: This privacy policy explains how Shiftly ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, and protects personal data when you visit our website. We are committed to handling your data responsibly and in accordance with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP/nDSG) and the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
Privacy.controllerText: The entity responsible for processing your personal data is:
Privacy.dataCollectedIntro: We collect personal data only in the following situations:
Privacy.contactFormText: When you voluntarily submit our contact form, we collect the information you provide:
Privacy.technicalDataText: When you visit our website, our hosting provider (Vercel) automatically collects certain technical data such as your IP address, browser type, operating system, and the pages you visit. This data is processed by Vercel to deliver and secure the website and is not accessed or stored by us.
Privacy.purposeText: We use the data you submit through the contact form exclusively to:
Privacy.purposeRespond: Respond to your inquiry or demo request.
Privacy.purposeDeliver: Provide you with information about Shiftly that you have requested.
Privacy.legalBasisText: The legal basis for processing is your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) given by voluntarily submitting the form, and our legitimate interest in responding to your request (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR). Under the Swiss FADP, processing is lawful as it is carried out in connection with a pre-contractual relationship and in good faith.
Privacy.thirdPartyIntro: We use the following third-party services to operate this website:
Privacy.thirdPartyVercel: Hosts and delivers our website. Vercel may process technical data (IP address, request metadata) to provide its hosting service. Vercel's privacy policy: https://vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy
Privacy.thirdPartyResend: Delivers the email notification to us when you submit the contact form. Resend processes your name, email address, and form content solely for email delivery. Resend's privacy policy: https://resend.com/legal/privacy-policy
Privacy.thirdPartyNote: We do not use any analytics, advertising, or tracking services. We do not sell, share, or otherwise transfer your data to third parties beyond what is described above.
Privacy.transferText: Vercel and Resend are US-based companies. Your data may be transferred to and processed in the United States. These transfers are safeguarded by Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and/or other appropriate safeguards as required by applicable data protection laws.
Privacy.cookiesText: This website uses only one cookie:
Privacy.cookieLocale: Stores your preferred language (en, it, de, fr). This is a strictly functional cookie required for the website to display content in your chosen language. It contains no personal data and is not used for tracking.
Privacy.cookiesNone: We do not use any analytics, marketing, or third-party cookies. No cookie consent banner is required as we only use strictly necessary cookies.
Privacy.retentionText: The data you submit through the contact form is delivered to us via email and is not stored in any database. We retain your contact information only for as long as necessary to respond to your inquiry and for any follow-up communication. You may request deletion of your data at any time.
Privacy.rightsIntro: Under the FADP and GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
Privacy.rightAccess: Right to access your personal data.
Privacy.rightRectification: Right to rectification of inaccurate data.
Privacy.rightDeletion: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten").
Privacy.rightsExercise: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at
Privacy.rightsComplaint: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Swiss Federal Data Protection and Information Commissioner (FDPIC) or, if applicable, with your local EU supervisory authority.
Privacy.childrenText: This website is not directed at children and we do not knowingly collect personal data from children under the age of 16.
Privacy.changesText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be published on this page with an updated date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
Privacy.contactText: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at
